sections.label: Lyrics
lines: [Verse 1]
I said Your name like it was breaking
Through the ash of a quiet sky
Every word felt thin and shaking
Like hope forgot how to rise
The night told me I was forgotten
That heaven learned to look away
I held my breath in the silence
Afraid of what faith might say
[Pre-Chorus]
But the dark doesn’t cancel the promise
And waiting isn’t the end
Just because I can’t feel Your presence
Doesn’t mean You ever left
[Chorus]
I will never forget God
Even when I feel forgotten
My name is carved into forever
Where Your hands are still holding
If the earth erases my footsteps
And the stars forget my face
I will never forget God
I’m written in a permanent place
[Verse 2]
I watched the world keep breathing
Like grief was a private sound
Like love should arrive in an instant
Not grow while breaking me down
I asked how a soul keeps trusting
When answers refuse to come
How mercy can feel like distance
When it’s sworn it won’t be gone
[Bridge]
If I fall between the moments
If my voice dissolves in time
You don’t remember me in thought
You remember me in life
Before my fear learned language
Before my doubt had a name
I was etched into Your palms
Not in ink — but in pain
[Chorus – Reprise]
I will never forget God
Even when the world convinces me
That love has limits and endings
And grace forgets history
If heaven stays closed and silent
And faith feels heavy and odd
I will never forget God
Because You never forgot
[Outro]
So let the silence keep speaking
let the night take its length
I am held in the hands of forever
Remembered beyond my strength
